steps.title: Locate the displayed artwork
steps.content: The passage says that in 2017 Salazar created a life-size pinata-like sculpture of the Gypsy Rose lowrider car, and that this work was displayed at the Petersen Automotive Museum.

steps.title: Reject wrong subjects
steps.content: A and C are paintings, but the text describes a sculpture. D names Jesse Valadez, who drove the car, but the artwork depicted the car itself. The displayed work was a sculpture of a lowrider car. The answer is B.
